'''竏嗟-ch-h-w''' ('''kalachhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebop|bebop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebop|bebop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-ch-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalachhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilachewoko|thilachewoko]] || [[word:jilachewoko|jilachewoko]] || [[word:shilachewoko|shilachewoko]] || [[word:kilachewoko|kilachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulachewoko|thuthulachewoko]] || [[word:jujulachewoko|jujulachewoko]] || [[word:shushulachewoko|shushulachewoko]] || [[word:kukulachewoko|kukulachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulachewoko|thulachewoko]] || [[word:julachewoko|julachewoko]] || [[word:shulachewoko|shulachewoko]] || [[word:kulachewoko|kulachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulachewoko|thulachewoko]] || [[word:julachewoko|julachewoko]] || [[word:shulachewoko|shulachewoko]] || [[word:kulachewoko|kulachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelachewoko|thelachewoko]] || [[word:jelachewoko|jelachewoko]] || [[word:shelachewoko|shelachewoko]] || [[word:kelachewoko|kelachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholachewoko|thotholachewoko]] || [[word:jojolachewoko|jojolachewoko]] || [[word:shosholachewoko|shosholachewoko]] || [[word:kokolachewoko|kokolachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholachewoko|tholachewoko]] || [[word:jolachewoko|jolachewoko]] || [[word:sholachewoko|sholachewoko]] || [[word:kolachewoko|kolachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholachewoko|tholachewoko]] || [[word:jolachewoko|jolachewoko]] || [[word:sholachewoko|sholachewoko]] || [[word:kolachewoko|kolachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦlachewoko|thﾃｦlachewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦlachewoko|jﾃｦlachewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦlachewoko|shﾃｦlachewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦlachewoko|kﾃｦlachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalachewoko|thathalachewoko]] || [[word:jajalachewoko|jajalachewoko]] || [[word:shashalachewoko|shashalachewoko]] || [[word:kakalachewoko|kakalachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalachewoko|thalachewoko]] || [[word:jalachewoko|jalachewoko]] || [[word:shalachewoko|shalachewoko]] || [[word:kalachewoko|kalachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalachewoko|thalachewoko]] || [[word:jalachewoko|jalachewoko]] || [[word:shalachewoko|shalachewoko]] || [[word:kalachewoko|kalachewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
